== Notes for [[Item:Q83963|Q83963]] ==

ID: I84727

Name: Cornelia Cethegilla

Given Name: Cornelia

Surname: Cethegilla

Sex: F

_UID: 1D76F09846A5544B8928714E9B57BED39828

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: Servius Cornelius Servius Lentulus b: ABT 10 BC

Mother: Munantia Plancina b: ABT 10 BC

Marriage 1 Servius Cornelius Servius Salvidienus

Married:

Children

Servius Cornelius Salvidienus

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84727

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
